title: prainea limpato subsp. papuana
intro: Prainea limpato subsp. papuana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Prainea limpato subsp. papuana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Prainea limpato subsp. papuana are made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting the active compounds using a solvent such as ethanol or methanol.
